name: Kentucky Apple Festival Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the shortening and flour until combined.
2. Add salt and baking powder, then mix well.
3. Form the dough into two balls and place between two pieces of wax paper.
4. Roll out the dough to fit a pie dish lined with about 3/4 to 1 cup sugar.
5. Filling: Peel, core, and slice the apples.
6. Mix the sliced apples with cinnamon and sugar in a large bowl.
7. Pour the apple mixture into the prepared pie crust.
8. Dot the top of the filling with 1 1/2 tablespoons butter.
9. Cover with the remaining pie dough, sealing the edges.
10. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 60 to 75 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
